response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ development experience on the Windows platform, a core requirement for this role. While they have extensive experience in C/C++, their recent work has been primarily in Node.js, TypeScript, and other languages, with no clear evidence of recent Windows-focused C++ development. Domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income is also not evident.
strengths: Extensive software development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong problem-solving and technical craftsmanship demonstrated in various roles
Good understanding of software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, etc.)
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ Windows development experience (mandatory requirement)
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
Limited SQL Server/Oracle experience mentioned in resume
